'''鈭歸-ng-z''' ('''wangaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preassemble|preassemble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ng-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preassemble|preassemble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-ng-z
|-
! Lemma
| wangaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wangazithi|wangazithi]] || [[word:wangaziji|wangaziji]] || [[word:wangazishi|wangazishi]] || [[word:wangazi|wangazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wangazuthuth|wangazuthuth]] || [[word:wangazujuj|wangazujuj]] || [[word:wangazushush|wangazushush]] || [[word:wangaz|wangaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wangazuthu|wangazuthu]] || [[word:wangazuju|wangazuju]] || [[word:wangazushu|wangazushu]] || [[word:wangazu|wangazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wangazufuth|wangazufuth]] || [[word:wangazufuj|wangazufuj]] || [[word:wangazufush|wangazufush]] || [[word:wangazuf|wangazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wangazethe|wangazethe]] || [[word:wangazeje|wangazeje]] || [[word:wangazeshe|wangazeshe]] || [[word:wangaze|wangaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wangazothoth|wangazothoth]] || [[word:wangazojoj|wangazojoj]] || [[word:wangazoshosh|wangazoshosh]] || [[word:wangaz|wangaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wangazotho|wangazotho]] || [[word:wangazojo|wangazojo]] || [[word:wangazosho|wangazosho]] || [[word:wangazo|wangazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wangazofoth|wangazofoth]] || [[word:wangazofoj|wangazofoj]] || [[word:wangazofosh|wangazofosh]] || [[word:wangazof|wangazof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wangaz忙th忙|wangaz忙th忙]] || [[word:wangaz忙j忙|wangaz忙j忙]] || [[word:wangaz忙sh忙|wangaz忙sh忙]] || [[word:wangaz忙|wangaz忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wangazathath|wangazathath]] || [[word:wangazajaj|wangazajaj]] || [[word:wangazashash|wangazashash]] || [[word:wangaz|wangaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wangazatha|wangazatha]] || [[word:wangazaja|wangazaja]] || [[word:wangazasha|wangazasha]] || [[word:wangaza|wangaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wangazafath|wangazafath]] || [[word:wangazafaj|wangazafaj]] || [[word:wangazafash|wangazafash]] || [[word:wangazaf|wangazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:wangazasha|wangazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowangazasha|gowangazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwangazasha|gokiwangazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wangazn眉sha|wangazn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowangaznkn眉sha|gowangaznkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwangazn眉sha|gokiwangazn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wangazsh毛sha|wangazsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowangaznksh毛sha|gowangaznksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwangazsh毛sha|gokiwangazsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wangazrosha|wangazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowangaznkrosha|gowangaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwangazrosha|gokiwangazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wangazmusha|wangazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowangaznkmusha|gowangaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwangazmusha|gokiwangazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wangazsherasha|wangazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowangaznksherasha|gowangaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwangazsherasha|gokiwangazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:wangazngasha|wangazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowangaznkngasha|gowangaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwangazngasha|gokiwangazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wangazyasha|wangazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowangaznkyasha|gowangaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwangazyasha|gokiwangazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:wangazyamasha|wangazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowangaznkyamasha|gowangaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwangazyamasha|gokiwangazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wangazn眉sh毛sha|wangazn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowangaznkn眉sh毛sha|gowangaznkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwangazn眉sh毛sha|gokiwangazn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wangazn眉rosha|wangazn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowangaznkn眉rosha|gowangaznkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwangazn眉rosha|gokiwangazn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wangazn眉musha|wangazn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowangaznkn眉musha|gowangaznkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwangazn眉musha|gokiwangazn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:wangazsh毛n眉sha|wangazsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowangaznksh毛n眉sha|gowangaznksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwangazsh毛n眉sha|gokiwangazsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wangazsh毛rosha|wangazsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowangaznksh毛rosha|gowangaznksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwangazsh毛rosha|gokiwangazsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wangazsh毛musha|wangazsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowangaznksh毛musha|gowangaznksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwangazsh毛musha|gokiwangazsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:wangazron眉sha|wangazron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowangaznkron眉sha|gowangaznkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwangazron眉sha|gokiwangazron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:wangazrosh毛sha|wangazrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowangaznkrosh毛sha|gowangaznkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwangazrosh毛sha|gokiwangazrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wangazromusha|wangazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowangaznkromusha|gowangaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwangazromusha|gokiwangazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:wangazmun眉sha|wangazmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowangaznkmun眉sha|gowangaznkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwangazmun眉sha|gokiwangazmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:wangazmush毛sha|wangazmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowangaznkmush毛sha|gowangaznkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwangazmush毛sha|gokiwangazmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wangazmurosha|wangazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowangaznkmurosha|gowangaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwangazmurosha|gokiwangazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:wangaz|wangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:w忙ng忙z|w忙ng忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howangaz|howangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:how忙ng忙z|how忙ng忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowangaz|hohowangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohow忙ng忙z|hohow忙ng忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉wangaz|n眉wangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉w忙ng忙z|n眉w忙ng忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉wangaz|n眉n眉wangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉w忙ng忙z|n眉n眉w忙ng忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂wangaz|n茂wangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂w忙ng忙z|n茂w忙ng忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂wangaz|n茂n茂wangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂w忙ng忙z|n茂n茂w忙ng忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwangaz|luwangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luw忙ng忙z|luw忙ng忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwangaz|luluwangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluw忙ng忙z|luluw忙ng忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwangaz|liwangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liw忙ng忙z|liw忙ng忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwangaz|liliwangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliw忙ng忙z|liliw忙ng忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowangaz|kowangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kow忙ng忙z|kow忙ng忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowangaz|kokowangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokow忙ng忙z|kokow忙ng忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewangaz|kewangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kew忙ng忙z|kew忙ng忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewangaz|kekewangaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekew忙ng忙z|kekew忙ng忙z]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
